overview: Functional medicine clinic providing comprehensive natural healthcare through advanced testing and personalized treatment protocols designed to identify and correct the root causes of chronic health conditions.
highlights: Specializes in autoimmune conditions and Hashimoto's disease
Advanced functional lab testing and in-office diagnostics
Offers chiropractic care, clinical nutrition, and low-level laser therapy
targetAudience: Men, women, and families seeking to address the underlying causes of chronic health conditions through functional medicine.
